name: Pete's Delightful Delicious Apple Pie Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 medium apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
3. Add softened butter and egg to the dry ingredients. Mix with your hands until a dough forms.
4. Fold in apples and gently mix until evenly coated.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Allow bread to cool completely before slicing and serving.
